title: BlackBerry Returns to Growth on Record QNX Results
text: BlackBerry has returned to growth, driven by record QNX results and strong Secure Communications demand. For the full fiscal year 2026, Secure Communications revenue was $258.9 million with a segment adjusted gross margin of 70% and adjusted EBITDA of $56.1 million, representing a 22% margin. In the fourth quarter specifically, Secure Communications revenue grew 8% year-over-year to $72.5 million, with segment adjusted gross margin at 72%, up 8 percentage points year-over-year. Secure Communications returns to year-over-year revenue growth for the quarter, driven by accelerating demand for digital sovereignty solutions and expanding defence budgets. The division's performance was primarily driven by sales to the German government. BlackBerry forecast secure communications revenue will increase by 4 percent or more this year, as it generates operating earnings of US$57-million-plus. This marks a significant turnaround for the division, which had been struggling previously but has now returned to profitable growth.
